fair_value_today.basis: base case (Metis) intrinsic value — the anchor, not a weighted blend

fair_value_12m.basis: #1 rolled forward at r=9.0% less dividend 0.36

detail.multiple_rationale: 22x FY2027E EPS ($3.50): anchored to STM's historic through-cycle P/E of 15-18x (2019-2022) with a structural premium for the data center/satellite transformation. The premium is justified if the RF&OC segment generates a sustained 40%+ revenue CAGR through 2027 (already confirmed by the AWS deal and Starlink sole-source). 22x is the middle of where UBS (30x FY2027E) and the bears (15x) disagree. If the base case is tracking (data center $250M/Q by Q4 2026), 22x FY2027E = $77 — roughly price; if data center beats ($2B in 2027), 25x is defensible. The target takes the mid-point.

conviction.label: MEDIUM
conviction.basis: action HOLD: Daedalus assigned MEDIUM (evidence read across base/bull/bear) -> MEDIUM

bridge_logic: #1 fair value today 62.18 -> #3 fair value 12m 67.42 (x(1+0.090) - div 0.36); #4 target 12m 77.0 (defensible_multiple); implied return to #4 = -1.3%, to #3 = -13.5%, to street mean None = None%
